name: uccl
description: UCCL is an efficient communication library for GPUs, covering collectives, P2P (e.g., KV cache transfer, RL weight transfer), and EP (e.g., GPU-driven)
summaryZh: UCCL is an efficient communication library for GPUs, covering collectives, P2P (e.g., KV cache transfer, RL weight transfer), and EP (e.g., GPU-driven) 这是偏模型能力或模型封装的项目，适合作为能力底座持续观察。
whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
fitFor: 适合在持续跟踪 AI 开源趋势时作为重点观察对象。
